'''''Shark''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] stationed aboard [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Transport ''Shark'' captured [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Shuttle]] ''[[Electra]]'' and its Rebel Advisor occupants during the final engagement of the [[Battle on the Frontier]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
